task: I need to reply to a message about a group project, but I’m not sure how much detail to include. Can you help me draft a short response that gets the point across without turning it into a whole thing?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — use this:

**“I can do my part, but I need to know exactly what you want me to work on first.”**

If you want it firmer:

**“I can help, but tell me my part clearly so I’m not doing the wrong thing.”**

If you want it more casual:

**“Yeah, I can do it — just tell me what part I’m on.”**

If you want, I can make it:
- more polite
- more direct
- or more like a group chat text.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, the firmer one is fine. Short is better. I’d send: “I can help, but tell me my part clearly so I’m not doing the wrong thing.”
